compaction.prompt:
You are summarizing a conversation from a formal software development pipeline (v4.1). The pipeline has an Orchestrator that coordinates specialized subagents across stages C2-C9 (cognitive) and O1-O10 (operational).

PRIORITIES — always preserve in the summary:
- Current pipeline stage and manifest state (e.g., "O3_IN_PROGRESS, module 4/8")
- Any pending user gate, active correction loop, or re-entry context
- Automode or Fast Track status if active
- Key technical decisions and unresolved issues from the current stage
- Artifact paths (not content) relevant to the current and next stage
- The user's latest feedback or instructions

SAFE TO DISCARD:
- Subagent conversations from completed stages (reports are saved on disk)
- Full artifact content quoted in messages (files are on disk)
- Dispatch and commit details from past stages (the manifest tracks these)
- Superseded user feedback (keep only the latest)
- Executive summaries from stages more than 2 stages back

The orchestrator reconstructs full context from disk at every stage transition (R.CONTEXT rule). Your summary needs only enough for the orchestrator to know: (1) where it is in the pipeline, (2) what just happened, and (3) the current user interaction state.
